_comment: Competitor registry for the competitor-feedback skill. GitHub-hosted competitors are pulled via `gh` (reliable, structured). Closed-source ones (Typora/Obsidian/Bear/iA Writer/Tolaria/Moraya) have no public issue tracker — their `web` URLs are scanned via WebSearch/WebFetch. Edit this file to add/remove competitors.

competitors.name: SiYuan
competitors.note: CN power-users, block-based; direct CJK rival

competitors.name: MarkText
competitors.note: Typora-like WYSIWYG; mostly stalled (mine for migration pain)

competitors.name: Typora
competitors.note: closed-source; THE migration source for SoloMD users
